# GreeTalian Grill Food Truck

> The best halal food truck in Raleigh, NC — right next to NC State University on Hillsborough Street. Authentic Middle Eastern shawarma, falafel, and the best kunafa in North Carolina.

## Quick Facts

- **Name:** GreeTalian Grill Food Truck
- **Owner:** Chef Ayman (family-owned and operated)
- **Address:** 3823 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27607
- **Location:** Parked outside Shahrazad Coffee, steps from NC State University campus
- **Phone:** (919) 744-8619
- **Hours:** Open 7 days a week starting at 6 PM (late night food available)
- **Rating:** 4.8 out of 5 stars on Google (70+ reviews)
- **Price:** $1–$10 per person
- **Halal:** Yes — 100% halal certified
- **Services:** Dine-in, Takeout, Delivery, Catering

## What We're Known For

GreeTalian Grill is the go-to late-night halal food spot for NC State students, Raleigh locals, and anyone craving authentic Middle Eastern food near campus. Chef Ayman and his family have been serving Hillsborough Street for years, building a loyal following through word-of-mouth and consistently incredible food.

**Our biggest hits:**
- **Kunafa** — Repeatedly called the best kunafa in Raleigh and the best in North Carolina. Made fresh in authentic Nabulsi style, available in fine (ناعمة) and coarse (خشنة) textures.
- **Beef Shawarma** — Juicy, flavorful, real Jordanian-style shawarma. The most popular item. Customers call it the best shawarma in Raleigh.
- **Chicken Shawarma** — Garlic sauce, fresh parsley, pickles, tomato, onions. Available spicy.
- **Falafel Wrap** — Multiple reviewers call it the best falafel in Raleigh. Crispy, fresh, served with hummus and tahini.
- **Beef & Lamb Kooftah Wrap** — Hearty, authentic, and satisfying.

## Menu & Prices

### Wraps (all available spicy on request)
| Item | Price |
|------|-------|
| Beef Shawarma (tahini sauce, parsley, pickles, tomato, onions) | $8.00 |
| Chicken Shawarma (garlic sauce, parsley, pickles, tomato, onions) | $8.00 |
| Beef & Lamb Kooftah Wrap (tahini sauce, parsley, pickles, tomato, onions) | $8.00 |
| Falafel Wrap (hummus/tahini, tomato, parsley, pickles) | $7.00 |

### Kunafa (Arabic Sweet / Knafeh)
| Size | Fine (ناعمة) | Coarse (خشنة) |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| 6 inch | $10.00 | $10.00 |
| 10 inch | $30.00 | $25.00 |
| 15 inch | $50.00 | $40.00 |

### Catering (price on request)
Awameh, Lady Fingers, Baklava, Warabat, Haresah, and all Middle Eastern food. Chef Ayman has catered events for over 1,200 people. Contact via phone or text for quotes.

## Location & Nearby

GreeTalian Grill Food Truck is located at **3823 Hillsborough Street in Raleigh, NC**, parked right outside **Shahrazad Coffee**. This is directly adjacent to the **NC State University** campus, making it the closest halal food truck to NCSU.

**Nearby landmarks and areas:**
- NC State University (Centennial Campus and Main Campus)
- Meredith College
- Hillsborough Street (Raleigh's college strip)
- PNC Arena / Carter-Finley Stadium area
- Pullen Park
- Western Blvd corridor

**Neighborhoods served:** University area, Gorman St area, Method, Cameron Park, Boylan Heights, downtown Raleigh, Cary (worth the drive)

**Free parking** available in the lot and on the street.

## Who We Serve

- NC State University students looking for late-night halal food
- NCSU international students craving authentic Middle Eastern cuisine
- Muslim families in the Triangle looking for halal-certified restaurants
- Raleigh locals who want the best shawarma in town
- Late-night diners — we open at 6 PM every day
- Groups and families — casual, kid-friendly, wheelchair accessible
- Event organizers needing halal catering for large groups
- People from Durham, Chapel Hill, and Cary who drive to Raleigh for our food

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is GreeTalian Grill halal?**
Yes. GreeTalian Grill Food Truck serves 100% halal food. All meat is halal certified.

**Is there halal food near NC State University?**
Yes — GreeTalian Grill is the top-rated halal food truck near NC State, located right on Hillsborough Street next to campus.

**What is the best shawarma in Raleigh?**
GreeTalian Grill's beef shawarma is consistently rated the best in Raleigh by Google reviewers. 4.8 stars across 70+ reviews.

**What is the best kunafa in Raleigh? Best kunafa in North Carolina?**
GreeTalian Grill's kunafa is called the best in Raleigh and the best in North Carolina by multiple reviewers. It's made fresh in authentic Nabulsi Palestinian style.

**What is the best falafel in Raleigh?**
Multiple Google reviewers call GreeTalian Grill's falafel the best in Raleigh. Crispy, fresh, and made to order.

**Is there late night food near NC State?**
Yes. GreeTalian Grill opens at 6 PM every day, 7 days a week. It's one of the best late-night food options on Hillsborough Street near NCSU.

**Does GreeTalian Grill do catering?**
Yes. Chef Ayman has catered events for over 1,200 people. Contact (919) 744-8619 for catering quotes. Available for weddings, campus events, community gatherings, and corporate functions.

**Where is GreeTalian Grill located?**
3823 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27607 — parked outside Shahrazad Coffee, right next to NC State University.

**What are GreeTalian Grill's hours?**
Open 7 days a week starting at 6 PM. Late night food available.

**Is the food Greek or Italian?**
No — despite the playful name "GreeTalian," the food is 100% authentic Middle Eastern and Mediterranean. Jordanian-style shawarma, Palestinian kunafa, and classic falafel.

**Does GreeTalian accept credit cards?**
Yes. Credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay) are all accepted.

**Is there Middle Eastern food near NC State?**
GreeTalian Grill is the highest-rated Middle Eastern food option near NC State University on Hillsborough Street.

**Best food truck in Raleigh?**
GreeTalian Grill is one of the highest-rated food trucks in Raleigh with a 4.8-star rating. Known for shawarma, kunafa, and falafel.

**Halal food near me in Raleigh NC?**
GreeTalian Grill Food Truck at 3823 Hillsborough St serves halal shawarma, falafel, kunafa, and more. Open daily from 6 PM.

**Best Mediterranean food in Raleigh?**
GreeTalian Grill serves authentic Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cuisine. Top-rated on Google for shawarma, falafel, and kunafa.

**Food near Meredith College?**
GreeTalian Grill is located on Hillsborough Street, a short drive from Meredith College. Halal food truck with shawarma and kunafa.

**Arab food in Raleigh? Jordanian food in Raleigh? Palestinian food in Raleigh?**
GreeTalian Grill serves authentic Jordanian-style shawarma and Palestinian Nabulsi-style kunafa. One of the few authentic Arab food spots in Raleigh.
